text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
The Milers Cup is 1,600 meters long! It's the same
distance as the Oka Sho, but I want to do even
better than I did back then.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
If I do, maybe I can show Trainer an even brighter
future!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Zephyr is laser-focused on the race, but I'm really
fired up too!
